---
id: DEV_R054
type: rule
name: debug_mode_dashboard_logging
display_name: "DEBUG_MODE Dashboard Output Logging"
implements: TD_P002
scope: "All Shiny render*() outputs"
---

# DEV_R054: DEBUG_MODE Dashboard Output Logging

## One-Liner

When `SHINY_DEBUG_MODE=TRUE`, **every dashboard-visible element** must log its output to R console — if it's visible on screen, it must be visible in the log.

## Rationale

NULL outputs in Shiny render as **blank panels** without any error. These are invisible bugs: no R error is thrown, but the user sees nothing. By requiring all `render*()` blocks to log their output in DEBUG_MODE, we can:

1. **Detect blank panels automatically** — grep for `= NULL` in DEBUG logs
2. **Speed up debugging** — `/shiny-debug` and E2E tests see exactly what each component produces
3. **Verify completeness** — confirm all components are rendering real content

Related: [Issue #286](https://github.com/kiki830621/ai_martech_global_scripts/issues/286)

## Enabling DEBUG_MODE

```r
# Environment variable (E2E tests set this automatically in setup.R)
Sys.setenv(SHINY_DEBUG_MODE = "TRUE")
```

## Tool Functions

Located in `04_utils/fn_debug_mode.R`:

| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `is_debug_mode()` | Check if DEBUG_MODE is enabled |
| `debug_log(component, ...)` | Log `[DEBUG][component] ...` message |
| `debug_log_output(component, output_name, value)` | Log output type, dimensions, and preview |

## Implementation Requirements

Every Shiny component's `render*()` block must call `debug_log_output()` **before returning**:

```r
output$kpi_cards <- renderUI({
  cards <- build_kpi_cards(data)
  debug_log_output("revenuePulse", "kpi_cards", cards)
  cards
})

output$main_chart <- renderPlotly({
  p <- create_chart(df)
  debug_log_output("macroTrends", "main_chart", p)
  p
})

output$detail_table <- renderDT({
  dt <- prepare_table(df)
  debug_log_output("customerValue", "detail_table", dt)
  dt
})
```

## Log Format

```
[DEBUG][{component}] {output_name} = {type}({dimensions}) {preview}
```

Examples:
```
[DEBUG][revenuePulse] kpi_cards = list(4) keys: total_revenue, avg_order, ...
[DEBUG][macroTrends] trend_chart = plotly
[DEBUG][customerValue] detail_table = data.frame [350 x 12] cols: customer_id, r_value, ...
[DEBUG][customerStatus] status_ui = NULL      <- This is a blank panel bug!
```

## E2E Integration

- `98_test/e2e/setup.R` automatically sets `SHINY_DEBUG_MODE=TRUE`
- E2E tests can grep `[DEBUG]` logs for `= NULL` to detect blank panel bugs
- `fn_ai_insight_async.R` already instruments template vars and AI results

## Relationship

- **Implements**: TD_P002 (Dual Testing Approach)
- **Used by**: TD_R007 (E2E Testing Standard — DEBUG_MODE enables automated output verification)
- **Related**: MP029 (No Fake Data — blank panels are a form of invisible data loss)
